parsed.simulated_user_message: I keep thinking the conference will expose all my flaws, and I can't even see the point of taking a walk because I'm too tired. My body feels off, and I feel like I'm failing at every level.

parsed.reasoning: I'm here as a friend to listen and support, and it seems like you're feeling really overwhelmed right now. Given your intent to express emotion, I think a good strategy would be to use complex_reflection to help you explore your feelings. The evidence that stands out to me is your mention of feeling like you're failing at every level and your body feeling off, which suggests that you're experiencing a lot of self-doubt and physical discomfort. My entry point will be to acknowledge the weight of these emotions and see if we can't break them down together.

evidence_used.content: feeling like you're failing at every level

parsed.final_response: You're feeling like everything is falling apart, and even small things like taking a walk seem impossible right now. It sounds like the conference is weighing heavily on your mind, and you're worried about being exposed. Your body is also feeling off, which can be really frustrating. Can you tell me more about what's going through your mind when you think about the conference?
